name: Spam Primavera
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, cook Spam, carrots, zucchini, onion and garlic in 3 tablespoons olive oil until the vegetables are crisp and tender.
2. Toss together linguini, vegetable mixture, grated parmesan cheese, remaining 3 tablespoons olive oil, and lemon juice until well coated. Serve immediately.
